deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd

Officially closed and funded at $152,000 cash.
Cleared and funded.

Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo. Family member of lien holder Fernando Castillo. Willing to help.
Joyce sent lien bypass form. Lien holder can sign to skip 45-day wait.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20ac hunting land. First offer (Michael Rodriguez / RBFCU) dead — no earnest money. Steve cleared property. New prospect interested in subdividing or alternate use reached out May 9. Strategy: land-only cash deal, buyer does what they need after close.
deals.next: Follow up with new prospect who wants to show. Get drone footage for marketing. Lead with net after close on any offer.

logs.m: Steve sent new green screen photos. New prospect reached out — interested in subdividing or alternate use. Sent her info and set expectations.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer confirmed dead. Drone footage flagged as next content priority.
First offer basically dead. Option money never received. Steve still clearing property. Shift to net-after-close framing for next offer.
RBFCU financing decision expected Apr 10 — stalled.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Two bids compared: HouzzPro/Matt Toney ($54,877) vs T&T/Kendall ($61,980). Jerry recommended HouzzPro to Ray Stidham. Matt Toney connected directly with Jerry. Dumpsters dropping this weekend.
deals.next: Swing by property when in Devine to check progress. Check clubhouse for local contractor references.

logs.m: Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend. Will check progress on next Devine trip.
Met Matt Toney in office. Connected him directly with Jerry Sadler by phone. Goal: work starts by Monday.
Two estimates fully compared. Jerry emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as decision-maker.
Bank damage liability clarified — damage after bank possession. Kendall pricing flagged as too high. Shopping alternatives.
Kelly confirmed damage occurred after bank took possession in December. Meeting Matt Van Gorder on-site.
Kelly asked Chris to file police report. Lawyer Deborah Geiger confirmed son caused damage.
Shot video and photos. Sent to Kendall and Matt Van Gorder for quotes.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Sellers underwater by $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Vacant 6 months, double-carrying costs. 208 DOM. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close. Showing May 5 — feedback needed.
deals.next: Get feedback from May 5 showing agent. Follow up with Matt and Chandler on path decision. Drop sign and lockbox when in Devine.

logs.m: Dropping sign and lockbox this week. Need showing feedback from May 5 agent before updating sellers. Grass still unresolved.
Showing at 2pm by outside agent. Lawn care referral received from Garry Stephens — Morales Tree Trimming 830-444-7804.
Express Offers returned $550K — likely off. Showing scheduled May 4 at 2pm. Checking in with Matt and Chandler on options.
Full CMA completed. Market value $350K-$400K. Payoff ~$493K. Three paths identified and documented.
Seller finance buyers appear wishy-washy via Gilberto. Honest price adjustment conversation needed.
Gilberto connected through Josh LT — found potential seller finance buyer waiting on insurance claim funding.
Showing at property — potential owner finance buyer. Using as leverage for pricing strategy conversation.

deals.next: Canvass neighborhood before launch. Drop sign and lockbox this week. Go live May 13.
